image.description: Any R object that can be coerced to a raster object

x.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying raster x-locations

y.description: A numeric vector, unit object, or a character vector of values containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying raster y-locations

width.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying raster widths

height.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying raster heights

just.description: A string specifying the justification of text relative to its (x, y) location

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x, y, width, or height are only given as numerics or numeric vectors

interpolate.description: A logical value indicating whether to linearly interpolate the image

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
